summary: Frontend testing completed for dashboard beautification redesign. All 6 features verified: metrics numbers in dedicated panel above project list, projects displayed in clean list rows, create project flow works, open project navigates to builder, delete project flow works, no overlap/overflow issues on desktop.
critical_code_review_comments: Console warning persists: 'Each child in a list should have unique key prop' in SectionRenderer - recommend fixing
Dashboard layout uses clean panel-shell rounded cards with proper spacing (28px gap between sections)
Stats panel positioned correctly above project list with 'Snapshot above your project list' heading
Project list items use clean card rows with status badge, name, description, metrics (Pages/Sections/Edited), and actions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard beautification completed. Layout hierarchy: Hero+Create panel → Stats strip panel (Projects/Pages/Sections numbers) → Project list panel with clean rows. All CRUD operations (create/open/delete) verified working.

details: Stats strip panel with 'Workspace Numbers' heading positioned above 'Project list'
3 stat cards: Projects (5), Saved Pages (15), Saved Sections (81)
Stats bottom at 817.5px, Projects top at 845.5px - correct ordering verified
Projects displayed as clean horizontal list items (not cluttered cards)
Each row has: DRAFT badge, Updated timestamp, Project name, Description
Metrics panel: Pages count, Sections count, Last edited timestamp
Action buttons: Open (primary) and Delete (secondary outline)
Entered project name in input field
Clicked 'Create starter project' button
Successfully navigated to /builder/{project-id}
Project count increased from 5 to 6
New project appeared in dashboard list
Clicked Open button on project list item
Successfully navigated to /builder/{project-id}
Builder page loaded with all sections
Clicked Delete button trigger
Confirmation dialog appeared with 'Delete this project?' title
Clicked 'Delete project' confirmation
Project removed from list, count decreased from 6 to 5
Toast: 'Project removed from the dashboard.'
Hero panel y=122-570, Stats panel y=598-817.5, Projects panel y=845.5+
No overlaps detected between any panels
Page width 1920px matches viewport - no horizontal overflow
Clean spacing maintained throughout

design_review.contrast: GOOD - White text (rgb(255,255,255)) on dark background (#09090B)
design_review.typography: GOOD - Uppercase tracking labels (10px), Large number values (30px)
design_review.buttons: GOOD - Clear visual hierarchy (primary purple, secondary outline)
